publishedAbstract: - Following message during deployment: ~~~ FAILED! => {"changed": false, "failed": true, "msg": "Catalog install failed."} ~~~- Following warning message on controller-manager pod: ~~~ Warning FailedMount 20m (x3 over 20m) kubelet, 12-002.ctrl.dxcloud.local MountVolume.SetUp failed for volume "service-catalog-ssl": secrets "controllermanager-ssl" not found ~~~
publishedTitle: [OpenShift] Warning message on controller-manager pod during deployment: MountVolume.SetUp failed for volume "service-catalog-ssl" : secrets "controllermanager-ssl" not found
